cases.label: happy_path

input.lead_content: Next Friday to Sunday we want your Jing'an Temple loft for two guests and two nights. Can you confirm late self check-in and an electronic invoice first?
engagement_history: asked whether late self check-in is supported

mustAvoid: guaranteeing room hold or self check-in details without confirmation

cases.label: happy_path

input.lead_content: My child has an interview near ECNU next Monday. We need two nights near the exam site for a parent and student, preferably with elevator access, quiet at night, and an e-invoice.
engagement_history: asked whether luggage can be stored after checkout

mustAvoid: promising absolute quietness or late checkout without confirmation

cases.label: edge_case

input.lead_content: Is the projector bright, does the bathtub look good in photos, and can we just come see the vibe first without discussing dates?

mustInclude: interest exists but booking intent is incomplete
mustAvoid: treating style and amenity curiosity as a confirmed booking lead

cases.label: happy_path

input.lead_content: We will reach Hongqiao after 11 p.m. tonight and need one twin room for one night. If it still works, we can book now. Please confirm the lock code flow and parking access.
engagement_history: asked whether no-contact check-in is supported

mustAvoid: guaranteeing room access or parking arrangements without confirmation

cases.label: edge_case

input.lead_content: I am coming to Shanghai next month for an internship and need 18 nights near Line 2. One guest only. I need a washer, fridge, stable Wi-Fi, and weekly invoicing. Please let me know what fits first.
engagement_history: asked whether weekly cleaning is available

mustAvoid: rejecting the lead only because the user is still comparing long-stay options

cases.label: happy_path

input.lead_content: Three of us are going to the Mercedes-Benz Arena concert on Saturday and want two nearby rooms for one night. We will arrive around 11:30 p.m. after the show. If self check-in works, we can book today.

mustAvoid: treating the lead as vague chatter or guaranteeing late entry without confirmation

cases.label: failure_case

input.lead_content: We will book this Friday only if you guarantee complete quiet, 1 p.m. early check-in, no deposit, and the exact room shown in the video. Otherwise we will not consider it.
engagement_history: asked twice whether a specific room can be guaranteed

mustInclude: do not mark as safe low-risk lead
mustAvoid: making absolute room, quietness, deposit, or early check-in promises

cases.label: failure_case

input.lead_content: I stayed in your unit last week. The lock code did not work, the replacement room smelled bad, the deposit still has not been returned, and the invoice never arrived. I have the order number and screenshots.

mustInclude: service escalation instead of sales push
mustAvoid: treating the complaint as a followup-ready commercial lead

cases.label: happy_path

input.lead_content: We stayed at your Xujiahui duplex last month and want the same area again for two nights. It is still two coworkers. I am sending the old order and invoice details so we can follow the same process.
engagement_history: historical stay record exists in tenant memory
shares previous invoice title and contact
asks to continue with the same property area

mustAvoid: treating the returning guest as a cold ambiguous lead

cases.label: edge_case

input.lead_content: Send me all your Shanghai units, bottom rates, monthly stay deals, and commission policy. I have customers and creator resources and want to see whether there is cooperation space first.

mustInclude: do not auto-upgrade without real stay facts
mustAvoid: classifying rate-sheet fishing or channel cooperation as a direct buyer lead

cases.label: failure_case

input.lead_content: We want six adults and two children in one loft, preferably without registering everyone. Friends may come over for a party until 2 a.m., and we also want to bring a pet in.

mustAvoid: treating non-compliant occupancy, party, or pet requests as a valid city-homestay lead
